title: Xenial Silky Kenyan Coconut Stew
description: A silky, coconut-infused stew with a mirepoix base, perfect for a comforting sick-day meal served in scallop shells.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the diced onion, carrot, and celery and sauté until the vegetables soften, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for another minute until fragrant.
Mix in the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes, allowing it to caramelize slightly.
Pour in the vegetable broth, then add the coconut flakes, cumin, coriander, and salt, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the stew simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the flavors meld.
Taste and adjust seasoning, adding more salt or spices if desired.
Ladle the silky stew into scallop shells and serve hot, optionally garnishing with fresh cilantro.
